summary: Completed testing of Failure Modes Module Enhancements. All features working correctly: translation keys resolved, new fields visible and editable, Equipment dropdown in edit mode, duplicate name check working. Fixed backend service to include new fields in create/update/serialize methods.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend failure_modes_service.py was missing new fields (process, potential_effects, potential_causes, iso14224_mechanism) in create(), update(), and _serialize() methods - FIXED
All translation keys properly defined in LanguageContext.js for both EN and NL
FailureModeViewPanel.jsx correctly displays new fields in view mode and edit mode
FailureModesPage.js correctly includes new fields in create/edit dialog
Duplicate name check working via find_by_name() in failure_modes_service.py
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_FM_ prefixed failure modes for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Failure Modes Module Enhancements fully tested. New fields (process, potential_effects, potential_causes) are now properly saved and returned by the API. Equipment field is a dropdown in both create dialog and edit mode. Duplicate name check returns 400 error with message 'A failure mode with this name already exists'.

duplicate_name_check.POST /api/failure-modes rejects duplicat: PASSED - Returns 400 with 'A failure mode with this name already exists'

changes: Added process, potential_effects, potential_causes, iso14224_mechanism to create() method document
Added process, potential_effects, potential_causes, iso14224_mechanism to allowed_fields in update() method
Added process, potential_effects, potential_causes, iso14224_mechanism to _serialize() method response
